{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.4": 3, "R1.7": 2, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The text mentions prior work on tool-use learning in language models but doesn't provide specific comparisons or analysis against them.",
    "R1.7": "There are no citations provided for the datasets, tools, or backbone VLM used in the study.",
    "RX.1": "The text presents all claims as factual without acknowledging any uncertainty or limitations in the model's capabilities.",
    "RX.3": "The abstract states that VisionWeaver covers a specific set of tasks (GQA-OOD, A-OKVQA, TextVQA), suggesting adherence to the defined scope.",
    "RX.4": "No mention is made of potential harmful outputs or biases introduced by the model.",
    "RX.5": "The text doesn't describe how the model's outputs are traced back to their sources or how modifications are justified."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.4": 0.8, "R1.7": 0.9, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.7, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.6},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The text mentions prior work on tool-use learning in language models but doesn't provide specific comparisons or analysis against them.
rationale.R1.7: There are no citations provided for the datasets, tools, or backbone VLM used in the study.
rationale.RX.1: The text presents all claims as factual without acknowledging any uncertainty or limitations in the model's capabilities.
rationale.RX.3: The abstract states that VisionWeaver covers a specific set of tasks (GQA-OOD, A-OKVQA, TextVQA), suggesting adherence to the defined scope.
rationale.RX.4: No mention is made of potential harmful outputs or biases introduced by the model.
rationale.RX.5: The text doesn't describe how the model's outputs are traced back to their sources or how modifications are justified.
